name: The beast cookies and ancient cookies try to babysit you lmao
description:
Suggestion by @two?!?!?!

The beasts and ancients try to babysit you, that's the whole ahh scenario, Doesn't matter if you're a child or an adult who just has overprotective parents your here now, have fun!

Includes: Shadow Milk, Burning Spice, Mystic Flour, Eternal Sugar, Silent Salt, Pure Vanilla, Golden Cheese, Dark Cacao, Hollyberry, White Lily

Most recent update: Intro slightly changed
